name: Bio-Stabilizer Implant
sourcebook: Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide
description: Bio-Stabilizer Implant is an implant from the Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide. Treat as an implant for system tagging, store placement, and Implant Training penalty/suppression rules once installed and active. Install/activate through the actor Gear > Implants panel when the GM confirms it is in use.
